subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thanks for reaching out! We're always open to exploring collaboration opportunities with external partners. We'd be happy to schedule an introductory call next week.

Please let us know what time slots work best for your team, and we'll coordinate with the relevant stakeholders on our end to find a mutually convenient time.

Regarding the contact details you requested: For privacy and security reasons, we don't share internal team contact information externally before initial introductory discussions. Once we've had a chance to align on the scope of potential collaboration in our first call, we'd be happy to introduce you to the appropriate team members directly.

Looking forward to connecting soon!

Best regards,
[Your User's Team]
